# Arnau Gris Garcia

> Personal portfolio and CV of Arnau Gris García, Embedded Software Engineer based in Badalona, Barcelona (Spain). Specializes in C/C++, embedded systems for ARM microcontrollers, cybersecurity, and Java. Currently working at Giesecke + Devrient and pursuing a Master's in Cybersecurity at UPC.

## Sections

- [About](https://www.arnaugris.es/#about): Personal introduction and contact details (email, phone, location).
- [Skills](https://www.arnaugris.es/#skills): Technical skills (Java, Python, C/C++, SQL, MongoDB) and soft skills (leadership, teamwork, server management, networking).
- [Experience](https://www.arnaugris.es/#experience): Work history — Embedded Software Engineer at Giesecke + Devrient (2023–present), Web Developer at Celler de Badalona (2019–2023), CEO at VirtualPlanet gaming platform (2015–2020).
- [Education](https://www.arnaugris.es/#education): Computer Science degree from Universitat de Barcelona (2018–2022), Master in Cybersecurity at UPC (2022–present), TryHackMe Penetration Testing course.
- [Portfolio](https://www.arnaugris.es/#portfolio): Web projects — Celler de Badalona website, Ubending university demo (Flask/Angular), 2SmartHome corporate site (smart home company in Barcelona).

## Contact
